title: Surgeon Vacancy at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners!
